display_name: GREEN-DAY OFFENSE lane 1 (2026-07-01, measured 892-pos honest book): trades ONLY the one green cell that is +EV — MILD-GREEN CAPITULATIONS. Cell = 0<sol_pc_h6<=1.5 AND pc_h6<=-25: +4.57% mean / +4.01 median / 55.6% win, positive ALL 3 firing days, 14 distinct tokens (vs mild-green pump-retrace -5.39%/18.6%). CONVICTION SIZE $200 (2x family $100) because the cell is the only day-consistent green slice — the point is to make green days PAY, not just stop bleeding. Exits = family tight profile UNCHANGED (the +4.57 was realized WITH these exits; green-day bounces measured SMALLER, p90 peak 22.6 vs 90.1 red — do NOT let winners run here). Entry gate fail-open per condition on missing features (sol_pc_h6 coverage 100%). PAPER A/B vs the family; judge on scripts/honest_book.py scrubbed + per-token at n>=20 closes across >=3 mild-green days. Complements GREEN_DAY_MODE (defense) + the rip-day offense spec (wallet mine, sol>1.5 lane).
